prestazioni: Engine: Hyundai GDI 2.0L Theta II Turbo (G4KH) with TCR-spec forged internals, including Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression), Manley H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons for 350+ hp reliability at 2.2 bar boost on E85 fuel.

Turbocharger: Garrett MOTIV GT35R with a 0.82 A/R turbine housing, titanium-aluminide turbine wheel, and 62mm compressor wheel, paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe and a PTP Turbo 4-ply silicone coupler for optimized spool and reduced lag in TCR sprint races.

Suspension: Öhlins TTX40 MkII TCR-spec coilovers with 4-way adjustable damping, 24mm front/22mm rear adjustable anti-roll bars from H&R, and spherical bearing top mounts from Whiteline for precise camber and caster adjustments (up to -4.5° front camber).
estetica: Aerodynamics: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (TCR-spec front splitter, rear diffuser, and carbon fiber side skirts) with a 3D-printed ABS underbody diffuser for improved downforce (target: 150kg at 180 km/h).
Wheels: OZ Racing Superforgiata TCR wheels (9x18" ET45 front, 10.5x18" ET50 rear) wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (265/645R18 front, 285/645R18 rear) for optimal TCR circuit grip.

Interior: Sparco Pro2000 TCR-spec racing seat with 6-point Schroth Profi II harnesses, a custom carbon fiber dashboard overlay (replacing OEM plastics), and a Motec C127 dash logger with integrated Bosch MS4.0 ECU telemetry for real-time data acquisition.
